question: What synchrotron facility is this beamline part of?
What X-ray detector was used in this experiment?
What is the pixel size width of this detector?
What processing method was used to manufacture this sample?
What is the chemical formula of this sample?
What are the lattice parameters determined by Rietveld refinement of this diffraction pattern?
What is the dislocation density obtained from diffraction line profile analysis?
What phase fractions were determined by Rietveld refinement?
What is the beta transus temperature for this titanium alloy sample?
What crystal structure does the alpha-titanium phase have?
What grain morphology results from rapid solidification in LPBF?
What thermal profile was prescribed for this heat treatment?
What is the cooling rate used in this continuous cooling transformation experiment?
What azimuthal integration parameters were used to produce this 1D diffraction pattern?
What types of solid-state phase transformations are defined in the ontology?
What beamlines are available at the Advanced Photon Source?
sparql_query:
PREFIX mds: <https://cwrusdle.bitbucket.io/mds/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?beamline ?label
WHERE {
  ?beamline rdfs:subClassOf mds:Beamline .
  ?beamline rdfs:label ?label .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?label), "APS"))
}

question: What governing laws relate lattice parameters to other measurable quantities?
What phase does the beta-titanium phase transform into on cooling?
What is the isothermal hold temperature prescribed for this transformation experiment?
What additive manufacturing processes are defined in the ontology and what solidification behavior do they promote?
